positive: A stylized, minimalist depiction of a majestic owl perched on a crescent moon, surrounded by swirling constellations and subtle bioluminescent forest flora. The owl should have dramatic, sharp feather textures and intelligent, glowing eyes. Use a sophisticated nocturnal color palette of deep midnight blues, celestial purples, forest greens, and gold accents. The composition must be highly centered, emphasizing clean silhouettes and strong contrast against a dark, gradient background. Style should be hyper-detailed vector illustration meeting modern graphic novel aesthetics, suitable for screen printing on dark apparel. Perfect symmetry, highly scalable, emblem design.
